headline: Air Canada Pulls 2026 Guidance As Revenue Rises 11%
summary: Air Canada suspends its full-year outlook as higher jet fuel prices pressure aviation, despite first-quarter revenue beating estimates.

raw.headline: Air Canada Pulls 2026 Guidance As Revenue Rises 11%
raw.summary: Air Canada suspends its full-year outlook as higher jet fuel prices pressure aviation, despite first-quarter revenue beating estimates.

headline: Airfares skyrocket as much as 218% on Spirit Airlines’ busiest routes within just 48 hours of its May 2 liquidation
summary: A round-trip ticket from Las Vegas to Dallas-Fort Worth cost $39 on Spirit Airlines the morning of May 1. By the afternoon of May 3, that same itinerary on the next-cheapest carrier was selling for $124. That’s a 217.9% jump, and it happened inside the 48-hour window after Spirit’s 3:00 AM ET shutdown on May ... Airfares skyrocket as much as 218% on Spirit Airlines’ busiest routes within just 48 hours of its May 2 liquidation

headline: Summer airfares set to surge as jet fuel shortage grips market
summary: A shortage of jet fuel is sending summer airfares higher.

raw.headline: Summer airfares set to surge as jet fuel shortage grips market
raw.summary: A shortage of jet fuel is sending summer airfares higher.

headline: US Airlines Spent $5 Billion On Fuel In March Alone As Energy Crisis Deepens: Here's How Airline Stocks Have Fared Since Iran War Began
summary: Airline fuel costs surged 56% in March to over $5 billion due to war with Iran and oil market disruption, according to fresh BTS data.

raw.headline: US Airlines Spent $5 Billion On Fuel In March Alone As Energy Crisis Deepens: Here's How Airline Stocks Have Fared Since Iran War Began
raw.summary: Airline fuel costs surged 56% in March to over $5 billion due to war with Iran and oil market disruption, according to fresh BTS data.
